chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-691 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 08.05.2025 None present. ------ Per office note, instant petition has been listed for non prosecution as the petitioner as well as his counsel have failed to deposit the requisite sets and cost in the office for issuance of notice to other side. Perusal of file reveals that instant petition was submitted in the office on 29.10.2024 and was posted before the Court on 15.04.2025, when in absence of the petitioner as well as his counsel notices were directed to be issued. Today non appearance of the petitioner as well as his counsel shows that either the purpose for which instant petition was filed has been served or petitioner has lost his interest in proceeding, therefore, the petitioner as well as his counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently, instant petition is hereby dismissed in default. Judge Judge Manzoor
